title: Nestlé India announces senior management transition effective April 1, 2026 - scanx.trade
content:
Nestlé India announces senior management transition effective April 1, 2026
Nestlé India Limited has announced senior management changes effective April 1, 2026, with Ms. Krishna Guha Roy transitioning to a significant leadership role within Nestlé group and Mr. Prateek Tripathi appointed as Head - IS/IT & Nestlé Business Excellence. Mr. Tripathi, aged 45, brings over 21 years of experience and has been with Nestlé since 2019, currently serving as Data Governance Lead for Zone AOA. The disclosure was made under SEBI Listing Regulations on March 6, 2026.
*this image is generated using AI for illustrative purposes only.
Nestlé India Limited has announced significant changes in its senior management structure, with the transition taking effect from April 1, 2026. The company disclosed these changes in compliance with Regulation 30 and Schedule III of the SEBI Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements Regulations, 2015.
Leadership Transition Details
The management changes involve two key personnel in the IS/IT & Nestlé Business Excellence division:
Profile of Incoming Executive
Mr. Prateek Tripathi, aged 45 years, brings extensive experience to his new role as Head - IS/IT & Nestlé Business Excellence. His professional background includes:
Key Contributions and Expertise
Since joining Nestlé in 2019, Mr. Tripathi has demonstrated significant growth within the organization. He has rapidly advanced from Data Analytics Manager to becoming the driving force behind Analytics and Data Integration in the South Asia Region. His key contributions include:
- Enforcing compliance with data governance policies and processes
- Identifying optimization opportunities across Zone AOA
- Leading analytics and data integration initiatives in South Asia Region
The company noted that with his extensive expertise and significant contributions to the Nestlé group, Mr. Tripathi is well positioned to lead the IT function of the company.
Regulatory Compliance
The disclosure was made in accordance with Regulation 30 and Para A of Part A of Schedule III of the Listing Regulations, following SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/1/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026. The announcement was signed by Pramod Kumar Rai, Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, on March 6, 2026.
This leadership transition reflects Nestlé India's commitment to strengthening its technology and business excellence functions while ensuring continuity in its operations.
